publicPurpose: Audience-facing waitlist map for future Lux Veritas drops and commerce windows.
headline: Drops should belong to the world they come from.
summary: The public store begins as a drop room: release-linked objects, visual editions, live-room access paths, and selected atelier pieces held until each offer is ready.
notice: No purchase is accepted on this public page. Checkout, pricing, shipping, refunds, cancellations, and paid membership terms must be approved before commerce opens.

drops.label: Release Object
drops.title: Music-Linked Pieces
drops.body: Physical and digital objects tied to approved releases, sessions, radio signals, and listening-room moments.

drops.label: Visual Edition
drops.title: World Artifacts
drops.body: Prints, visual studies, books, and editioned pieces that carry the cinematic language of Lux Veritas.

drops.label: Live Room
drops.title: Room Access Paths
drops.body: Invitation interest for listening rooms, salons, private screenings, and destination cultural gatherings.

drops.label: Atelier
drops.title: Selected Goods
drops.body: Garments, objects, and supporter pieces that should feel connected to the releases and worlds around them.
